html:
Exclusive to:

The Mant Mask is a craftable Armor Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Fight Tab. It requires 5 Chitin and 1 Football Helmet to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.

It has a Durability of 450 and absorbs 80% of all physical damage. While being worn, the Mant Mask's durability will slowly decrease even when not taking damage, lasting a maximum of 10 Days if no damage is taken. A Sewing Kit will repair the Mant Mask by 50% Durability (225 HP).

When worn along with a Mant Suit, it allows the player to disguise among the Mants and make them neutral. They will still defend themselves if attacked, but this way they can be approached safely. However, Mant Warriors will not be fooled by the disguise.

Tips

  • Since the recipe accepts any durability Football Helmet, the Mant Mask is a good way to reuse old equipment.
  • Sewing Kits can be used to repair Mant Masks and Mant Suits, unlike Football Helmets and Log Suits.
  • Unlike the Football Helmet, the Mant Mask does not protect from Rain, so it may be better to keep a simple Football Helmet if it is heavily raining.

Gallery

  • Wilba wearing a Mant Mask.
  • Wheeler wearing a Mant Mask.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

The Mant Mask is a craftable Armor Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Fight Tab. It requires 5 Chitin and 1 Football Helmet to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.
It has a Durability of 450 and absorbs 80% of all physical damage. While being worn, the Mant Mask's durability will slowly decrease even when not taking damage, lasting a maximum of 10 Days if no damage is taken. A Sewing Kit will repair the Mant Mask by 50% Durability (225 HP).
When worn along with a Mant Suit, it allows the player to disguise among the Mants and make them neutral. They will still defend themselves if attacked, but this way they can be approached safely. However, Mant Warriors will not be fooled by the disguise.

Since the recipe accepts any durability Football Helmet, the Mant Mask is a good way to reuse old equipment.
Sewing Kits can be used to repair Mant Masks and Mant Suits, unlike Football Helmets and Log Suits.
Unlike the Football Helmet, the Mant Mask does not protect from Rain, so it may be better to keep a simple Football Helmet if it is heavily raining.

The '''Mant Mask''' is a craftable [[Armor]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Fight Tab]]. It requires 5 [[Chitin]] and 1 [[Football Helmet]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype.

It has a [[Durability]] of 450 and absorbs 80% of all physical damage. While being worn, the Mant Mask's durability will slowly decrease even when not taking damage, lasting a maximum of 10 Days if no damage is taken. A [[Sewing Kit]] will repair the Mant Mask by 50% Durability (225 HP).

When worn along with a [[Mant Suit]], it allows the player to disguise among the [[Mant]]s and make them neutral. They will still defend themselves if attacked, but this way they can be approached safely. However, [[Mant|Mant Warriors]] will not be fooled by the disguise.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Since the recipe accepts any durability [[Football Helmet]], the Mant Mask is a good way to reuse old equipment.
* Sewing Kits can be used to repair Mant Masks and Mant Suits, unlike Football Helmets and Log Suits.
* Unlike the Football Helmet, the Mant Mask does '''not''' protect from [[Rain]], so it may be better to keep a simple Football Helmet if it is heavily raining.
